name: Load Test - Python UDF Messages
description: Load test workflow using Python UDF for message creation

system_message.description: Optional system message to set context

data.code:
# Simple message creation without external APIs
import json

# Create messages array
messages = [
    {"role": "system", "content": input['system_message']},
    {"role": "user", "content": input['prompt']}
]

# Calculate some stats
total_length = len(input['system_message']) + len(input['prompt'])
word_count = len(input['prompt'].split()) + len(input['system_message'].split())

return {
    "messages": messages,
    "message_count": len(messages),
    "total_length": total_length,
    "word_count": word_count,
    "prompt_chars": len(input['prompt']),
    "system_chars": len(input['system_message'])
}
